sentences.target: Il n'y a pas de café ni de thé.
sentences.reading: /il nja pa də kafe ni də te/

translations.fr: Il n'y a pas de café ni de thé.
translations.ipa: /il nja pa də kafe ni də te/
translations.de: Es gibt weder Kaffee noch Tee.
translations.it: Non c'è né caffè né tè.
translations.tr: Ne kahve var ne de çay.
translations.vi: Không có cà phê cũng không có trà.
translations.nl: Er is geen koffie en geen thee.
translations.pl: Nie ma ani kawy, ani herbaty.
translations.el: Δεν υπάρχει ούτε καφές ούτε τσάι.
translations.nb: Det er verken kaffe eller te.
translations.sv: Det finns varken kaffe eller te.
translations.ro: Nu există nici cafea, nici ceai.
translations.da: Der er hverken kaffe eller te.
translations.ja: コーヒーもお茶もありません。

tokens.explanation: Expletive subject pronoun in the existential construction Il y a (‘there is/are’).
Clitic negation particle; first part of the discontinuous negation ne … pas.
Adverbial pronoun; in Il y a, contributes locative ‘there’ in the existential construction.
3rd person singular present of avoir; lexical verb used to form the existential ‘there is/are’.
Negative adverb; second part of the standard negation ne … pas.
Partitive/indefinite determiner after negation, introducing a mass noun.
Common noun; object within the scope of negation.
Coordinating conjunction ‘nor’, linking two noun phrases under negation.
Partitive/indefinite determiner repeated before the second coordinated noun.
Common noun; second coordinated object.

sentences.target: Je cuisine sans sel ni poivre.

translations.fr: Je cuisine sans sel ni poivre.
translations.en: I’m cooking without salt or pepper.
translations.de: Ich koche ohne Salz und Pfeffer.
translations.zh-Hans: 我做饭不放盐也不放胡椒。
translations.yue: 我煮嘢唔落鹽亦唔落胡椒。
translations.ru: Я готовлю без соли и перца.
translations.pt: Eu cozinho sem sal nem pimenta.
translations.he: אני מבשל בלי מלח ובלי פלפל.
translations.tr: Tuz ve biber katmadan yemek yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi nấu ăn không dùng muối cũng không dùng tiêu.
translations.ar: أطبخ من دون ملح أو فلفل.
translations.nl: Ik kook zonder zout of peper.
translations.uk: Я готую без солі та перцю.
translations.hi: मैं बिना नमक और काली मिर्च के खाना बना रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg lager mat uten salt og pepper.
translations.id: Saya memasak tanpa garam dan lada.
translations.sv: Jag lagar mat utan salt och peppar.
translations.da: Jeg laver mad uden salt og peber.
translations.fi: Laitan ruokaa ilman suolaa ja pippuria.
translations.ja: 塩もこしょうも使わずに料理しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
1st person singular present indicative; main verb.
Preposition ‘without’ introducing a nominal complement.
Common noun; complement of the preposition sans.
Coordinating conjunction ‘nor’, linking two complements of sans.
Common noun; second coordinated complement of sans.

sentences.target: Tu n'as pas de clé ni de carte.
sentences.reading: /ty na pa də kle ni də kaʁt/

translations.fr: Tu n'as pas de clé ni de carte.
translations.ipa: /ty na pa də kle ni də kaʁt/
translations.en: You don’t have a key or a card.
translations.es: No tienes ni llave ni tarjeta.
translations.de: Du hast weder einen Schlüssel noch eine Karte.
translations.it: Non hai né chiave né carta.
translations.ru: У тебя нет ни ключа, ни карты.
translations.pt: Você não tem nem chave nem cartão.
translations.he: אין לך מפתח ואין לך כרטיס.
translations.tr: Ne anahtarın var ne de kartın.
translations.vi: Bạn không có chìa khóa cũng không có thẻ.
translations.nl: Je hebt geen sleutel en geen pas.
translations.uk: У тебе немає ні ключа, ні картки.
translations.hi: तुम्हारे पास न चाबी है, न कार्ड।
translations.pl: Nie masz ani klucza, ani karty.
translations.el: Δεν έχεις ούτε κλειδί ούτε κάρτα.
translations.nb: Du har verken nøkkel eller kort.
translations.id: Kamu tidak punya kunci maupun kartu.
translations.sv: Du har varken nyckel eller kort.
translations.ro: Nu ai nici cheie, nici card.
translations.da: Du har hverken nøgle eller kort.
translations.fi: Sinulla ei ole avainta eikä korttia.
translations.ja: あなたは鍵もカードも持っていません。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun (informal).
Clitic negation particle before a vowel-initial verb; first part of ne … pas.
2nd person singular present of avoir; lexical verb ‘to have’.
Negative adverb; completes the negation with ne.
Indefinite determiner after negation, introducing a singular count noun.
Common noun; direct object within the scope of negation.
Coordinating conjunction ‘nor’, linking to an additional object.
Indefinite determiner repeated before the second coordinated noun.
Common noun; second coordinated object.

sentences.target: On prend ça sans sucre ni lait.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ sa sɑ̃ sykʁ ni lɛ/

translations.fr: On prend ça sans sucre ni lait.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pʁɑ̃ sa sɑ̃ sykʁ ni lɛ/
translations.en: We’ll take this without sugar or milk.
translations.es: Lo pedimos sin azúcar ni leche.
translations.de: Wir nehmen das ohne Zucker und Milch.
translations.it: Lo prendiamo senza zucchero né latte.
translations.ru: Возьмём это без сахара и молока.
translations.pt: Vamos tomar isto sem açúcar nem leite.
translations.he: ניקח את זה בלי סוכר ובלי חלב.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi lấy cái này không đường, không sữa.
translations.ar: سنأخذ هذا بدون سكر ولا حليب.
translations.nl: We nemen dit zonder suiker en zonder melk.
translations.uk: Візьмемо це без цукру і без молока.
translations.hu: Ezt kérjük cukor és tej nélkül.
translations.hi: हम इसे बिना चीनी और दूध के लेंगे.
translations.pl: Weźmiemy to bez cukru i bez mleka.
translations.el: Θα το πάρουμε χωρίς ζάχαρη και χωρίς γάλα.
translations.nb: Vi tar dette uten sukker og uten melk.
translations.id: Kami ambil ini tanpa gula dan tanpa susu.
translations.sv: Vi tar det här utan socker och utan mjölk.
translations.ro: Luăm asta fără zahăr și fără lapte.
translations.cs: Vezmeme si to bez cukru a bez mléka.
translations.da: Vi tager dette uden sukker og uden mælk.
translations.fi: Otamme tämän ilman sokeria ja ilman maitoa.
translations.ja: これを砂糖もミルクもなしでお願いします。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (‘one’/colloquial ‘we’).
3rd person singular present of prendre; main verb.
Demonstrative pronoun; direct object of the verb.
Preposition ‘without’ introducing nominal complements.
Common noun; complement of sans.
Coordinating conjunction ‘nor’, linking the second complement.
Common noun; second coordinated complement of sans.
